title: Paraspalathus ericifolia
taxonomy: Paraspalathus ericifolia is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to southern Africa, specifically in the mountainous regions. The plant is classified within the tribe Genisteae, which includes other shrub-like legumes. Paraspalathus ericifolia is further classified within the genus Paraspalathus. Within this genus, it is one of several species that are found in the region.
